articles.one_line: Capsey fires England to win over New Zealand in first T20

articles.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder
articles.summary: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
articles.one_line: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder

articles.title: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
articles.summary: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
